---
title: "Clever Woman of the Family, The. 2 vols. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Clever Woman of the Family, The. 2 vols. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1865
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and Cambridge: Macmillan and Company

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
